issue_summary: Fixed inverse cumulative probability for uniform distribution.
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Creates a uniform distribution.
     *
     * @param rng Random number generator.
     * @param lower Lower bound of this distribution (inclusive).
     * @param upper Upper bound of this distribution (exclusive).
     * @param inverseCumAccuracy Inverse cumulative probability accuracy.
     * @throws NumberIsTooLargeException if {@code lower >= upper}.
     * @since 3.1
     */
javadoc_after:
/**
     * Creates a uniform distribution.
     *
     * @param rng Random number generator.
     * @param lower Lower bound of this distribution (inclusive).
     * @param upper Upper bound of this distribution (exclusive).
     * @param inverseCumAccuracy Inverse cumulative probability accuracy.
     * @throws NumberIsTooLargeException if {@code lower >= upper}.
     * @since 3.1
     * @deprecated as of 3.2, inverse CDF is now calculated analytically, use
     *             {@link #UniformRealDistribution(RandomGenerator, double, double)}
     *             instead.
     */
